title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at India Ratings Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at India Ratings Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, India Ratings Ventures Solutions in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About India Ratings Ventures Solutions:
India Ratings Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings Ventures Solutions!
